title: Playground Project Document
concept: A document-style workspace that presents each Playground as a saved project with a project header, inline sections, document-outline navigation, and contextual actions for theme authors instead of modal stacks or a three-pane operations console.
focus: blue, green, and amber operational states
flows: Start from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PRs, Gutenberg PRs or branches, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, zip import, featured blueprints, or the full Blueprint gallery
Save a temporary Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with visible progress and project status
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with rename, delete, and continue actions
Navigate the embedded WordPress page from the project header with refresh, Homepage, and WP Admin shortcuts
Configure runtime versions, language, network, multisite, older-version visibility, destructive reset, and saved reload behavior
Use document sections for file browsing, code editing, Blueprint editing, database tools, logs, export, download, and import
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
understand destructive reset and saved reload behavior
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
